[COMPANY LETTERHEAD]

Date: 17 October 2023

Dear Dr. Samantha Tan,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Research Analyst at Quantum Insights Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 202312345A) with a starting annual salary of SGD 95,000. Your employment will commence on 1 November 2023 and is subject to the terms and conditions outlined in this letter.

Please note that this offer is contingent upon the satisfactory completion of your project plan review. The project status does not currently reflect any delays, ensuring a smooth transition into your new role. 

For identification purposes, your employee ID will be linked to your NRIC, which is S1234567A. For further details, please visit https://quantuminsights.sg/user/S1234567A. Should you have any questions, you can reach me at +65 6123 4567 or via email at samantha.tan@quantuminsights.sg.

Kindly sign and return a copy of this letter by 24 October 2023 to confirm your acceptance of this offer. We are excited to have you join our team and contribute to the success of Quantum Insights.

Yours sincerely,

Ms. Clara Lim  
Human Resources Manager  
Quantum Insights Pte. Ltd.  
clara.lim@quantuminsights.sg  
+65 6789 0123

[END OF DOCUMENT]
